common.notAuthenticatedDesc: Please sign in to view this page.
common.noOrganizationDesc: You need to create or join an organization to access this feature.

landing.heroHeadline: Turn a phone video into an immersive 3D property experience
landing.heroSubheadline: No special hardware. No LiDAR. Just your phone and our AI. Record a walkthrough, and Spatia generates an interactive 3D scene your clients can explore from anywhere.
landing.demoSubtitle: See what your clients will experience — walk through properties in full 3D, right in the browser.
landing.howItWorksSubtitle: Three simple steps from recording to immersive 3D walkthrough.
landing.step1Desc: Use your phone to record a simple video walkthrough of the property. No special equipment needed — just walk and film.
landing.step2Desc: Upload your video and our AI transforms it into a fully interactive 3D walkthrough — automatically.
landing.step3Desc: Send a simple link — clients explore the property in immersive 3D right in their browser. No app download needed.
landing.featuresSubtitle: Everything you need to create and share stunning 3D property walkthroughs.
landing.feature1Desc: Record on any smartphone. No LiDAR, no drones, no expensive camera rigs required.
landing.feature2Desc: Our AI transforms your video into a stunning, lifelike 3D experience automatically.
landing.feature3Desc: Share a link — no app install needed. Clients explore properties in 3D directly in their browser.
landing.feature4Desc: Works with any phone camera. No special sensors or expensive equipment needed.
landing.feature5Desc: Zero friction for clients. No downloads, no plugins — just click and explore in 3D.
landing.feature6Desc: Walkthroughs are processed in minutes, not hours. Real-time status updates keep you informed.
landing.testimonial1Quote: Spatia transformed how I showcase properties. My clients can explore homes remotely in stunning 3D — open house visits increased by 40%.
landing.testimonial2Quote: We used to spend thousands on professional 3D scanning. Now our agents just record a video on their phones. The quality is remarkable.
landing.testimonial3Quote: International clients can now walk through properties from another country. Spatia removed the biggest barrier in cross-border real estate.
landing.ctaSubtitle: Start generating immersive 3D walkthroughs from simple phone recordings. Free to get started.
landing.footerDescription: AI-powered 3D property walkthroughs from phone recordings. Built for real estate professionals who want to stand out.
landing.pricingSubtitle: Start free, upgrade when you're ready. No hidden fees.
landing.plan2Desc: For agents ready to impress every client.
landing.plan3Desc: For teams and agencies at scale.

auth.passwordWhitespace: Your password starts or ends with whitespace.
auth.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.emailExists: An account with this email already exists

auth.errorRateLimit: Too many emails sent recently. Please wait a few minutes before trying again.

auth.errorPasswordWeak: Password is too weak. Please choose a stronger password.
auth.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth.errorGoogleNotAvailable: Google sign-in is not available yet. Please use email instead.
auth.errorMissingCode: The verification link is invalid or has expired. Please try again.
auth.errorAuthFailed: Authentication failed. The link may have expired. Please try signing in again.
auth.errorNoSession: Could not establish a session. Please try again.
